sentence: 公园的西端有一片树林。
pinyin: Gōngyuán de xīduān yǒu yī piàn shùlín.
english: There is a grove of trees at the western end of the park.

sentence: 邻里之间应该互相帮助。
定期检查有助于早期发现乳腺癌。
pinyin: Dìngqī jiǎnchá yǒu zhù yú zǎoqī fāxiàn rǔxiàn ái.
english: Regular check-ups help detect breast cancer early.

sentence: 川菜是中国著名的菜系之一。
pinyin: Chuāncài shì Zhōngguó zhùmíng de càixì zhī yī.
english: Sichuan cuisine is one of China's famous regional cuisines.

sentence: 感恩节那天他们烤了一只火鸡。
pinyin: Gǎn'ēnjié nà tiān tāmen kǎo le yī zhī huǒjī.
english: They roasted a turkey on Thanksgiving Day.
